acceptance_checks.evidence: Add provider Claude Code classifies as ADD_PROVIDER targeting CLAUDE_CODE and reaches IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CREATED.
Create a server management domain classifies as CREATE_DOMAIN targeting SERVER_MANAGEMENT and reaches IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CREATED.
Create a filesystem worker classifies as CREATE_WORKER targeting SERVER_MANAGEMENT / FILESYSTEM and reaches IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CREATED.
Create a monitoring worker classifies as CREATE_WORKER targeting SERVER_MANAGEMENT / MONITORING and reaches IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CREATED.
Routing replay reconstruction exposes catalog version, catalog hash, catalog version hash, and match terms.
SERVER_MANAGEMENT worker families FILESYSTEM and MONITORING resolve through the domain-worker registry.

validation_commands.command:
printf 'Add provider Claude Code.
Create a server management domain.
Create a filesystem worker.
Create a monitoring worker.
exit
' | python -m aigol.cli.aigol_cli conversation --session-id SESSION-CLI-CATALOG-EXPANSION-000001 --created-at 2026-06-04T00:00:00+00:00 --runtime-root /tmp/aigol_conversation_resource_catalog_cli_acceptance
validation_commands.summary: All four prompts returned conversation_to_ppp_terminal_status: IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CREATED.
